mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM ( SELECT rownum rnum, data.* FROM ( SELECT f.boardId, CASE WHEN u.joined = 'N' THEN '탈퇴한 회원' ELSE f.userId END as userId, f.userName, f.category, f.title, f.viewCount, f.likeCount, f.commentCount, f.hidden, TO_CHAR(f.createdAt, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') as createdAt FROM freeboard f LEFT JOIN users u ON f.userId = u.id
ORDER BY CASE WHEN f.category = '공지' THEN 1 ELSE 2 END ASC, f.boardId DESC ) data ) WHERE rnum >= #{start} AND rnum <= #{end}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM freeboard f LEFT JOIN users u ON f.userId = u.id

SELECT f.boardId, CASE WHEN u.joined = 'N' THEN '탈퇴한 회원' ELSE f.userId END as userId, f.userName, f.category, f.title, f.content, f.viewCount, f.likeCount, f.commentCount, f.hidden, f.createdAt, f.updatedAt FROM freeboard f LEFT JOIN users u ON f.userId = u.id WHERE f.boardId = #{boardId}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO freeboard ( BOARDID, USERID, USERNAME, CATEGORY, TITLE, CONTENT, VIEWCOUNT, LIKECOUNT, COMMENTCOUNT, HIDDEN, CREATEDAT, UPDATEDAT ) VALUES ( freeBoard_seq.nextval, #{userId}, #{userName}, #{category}, #{title}, #{content}, 0, 0, 0, 0, SYSDATE, SYSDATE )
SELECT freeBoard_seq.currval FROM dual
mapper.update: UPDATE freeboard SET category = #{category}, title = #{title}, content = #{content}, updatedAt = SYSDATE WHERE boardId = #{boardId}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT boardId, title FROM freeboard WHERE boardId > #{boardId} AND hidden = 0 ORDER BY boardId ASC ) WHERE rownum = 1
SELECT * FROM ( SELECT boardId, title FROM freeboard WHERE boardId < #{boardId} AND hidden = 0 ORDER BY boardId DESC ) WHERE rownum = 1

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT f.boardId, CASE WHEN u.joined = 'N' THEN '탈퇴한 회원' ELSE f.userId END as userId, f.userName, f.category, f.title, f.viewCount, f.likeCount, f.commentCount, f.hidden, f.createdAt FROM freeboard f LEFT JOIN users u ON f.userId = u.id ORDER BY f.createdAt DESC ) WHERE rownum <= 5

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT f.boardId, CASE WHEN u.joined = 'N' THEN '탈퇴한 회원' ELSE f.userId END as userId, f.userName, f.category, f.title, f.viewCount, f.likeCount, f.commentCount, f.hidden, f.createdAt FROM freeboard f LEFT JOIN users u ON f.userId = u.id ORDER BY f.likeCount DESC ) WHERE rownum <= 5

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT f.boardId, CASE WHEN u.joined = 'N' THEN '탈퇴한 회원' ELSE f.userId END as userId, f.userName, f.category, f.title, f.viewCount, f.likeCount, f.commentCount, f.hidden, f.createdAt FROM freeboard f LEFT JOIN users u ON f.userId = u.id ORDER BY f.commentCount DESC ) WHERE rownum <= 5
